creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Booting FreeBSD CURRENT which is a NanoBSD UEFI bootable image as a guest, it is impossible to set the graphical resolution beyond 800x600 in X11! We use the most recent ports and most recent CURRENT as of today (r307993).

The console starts with something like 1024x768, but when the X11 system is active - using the port  emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions and from this the X11 driver "vboxvideo".

Somehow this is boring, even since the console shows a higher resolution at the start.
